query: SELECT id, colorCode, colorName, imageUrl, thumbnailUrl FROM material_colors WHERE colorCode LIKE '%ORIG%' OR id IN (SELECT materialColorId FROM product_variants WHERE variantCode LIKE 'DC-001-GRY-V012%') LIMIT 10;
